    (try simp_all [Matrix.toLin_apply]) <;>
    (try aesop)

-- Simplify the expression using the properties of the shared eigenbasis and the fact that the matrix is diagonal.
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.mul_assoc, Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.conjTranspose_apply,
      Pi.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.IsDiag, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true])
    <;>
    (try norm_num)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply,
      EuclideanSpace.toLp_zero, Pi.single_zero, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
      ite_true])
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Matrix.IsDiag, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply,
          EuclideanSpace.toLp_zero, Pi.single_zero, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
          ite_true]
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Matrix.isDiag_iff_diagonal_diag, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
          ite_true]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply,
          EuclideanSpace.toLp_zero, Pi.single_zero, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
          ite_true]
      })
  -- Same as the first goal, but with B instead of A
  · simp only [Matrix.sharedEigenvectorUnitary, OrthonormalBasis.coe_toBasis]
    rw [Matrix.isDiag_iff_diagonal_diag]
    symm
    apply Matrix.toEuclideanLin.injective
    apply (EuclideanSpace.basisFun _ 𝕜).toBasis.ext
    intro i
    open Matrix in
    open Matrix.IsHermitian in
    simp only [OrthonormalBasis.coe_toBasis,
      EuclideanSpace.basisFun_apply, toEuclideanLin_apply, EuclideanSpace.ofLp_single,
      mulVec_single, MulOpposite.op_one, one_smul, col_diagonal, diag_apply,
      EuclideanSpace.toLp_single]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.mul_assoc, Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.conjTranspose_apply,
      Pi.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.IsDiag, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true])
    <;>
    (try norm_num)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply,
      EuclideanSpace.toLp_zero, Pi.single_zero, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
      ite_true])
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Matrix.IsDiag, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply,
          EuclideanSpace.toLp_zero, Pi.single_zero, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
          ite_true]
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Matrix.isDiag_iff_diagonal_diag, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
          ite_true]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Pi.smul_apply,
          EuclideanSpace.toLp_zero, Pi.single_zero, Pi.one_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ,
          ite_true]
      })
